stories.headline: India denounces ‘hellhole’ remark shared by Trump
stories.description: India’s Foreign Ministry says comments by US radio host Michael Savage, circulated by Trump, are ‘uninformed’.

stories.headline: Global hunger report warns of rising malnutrition and famine risks
stories.description: Conflict remains the leading driver of hunger, affecting nearly 150 million people facing acute food shortages.

stories.headline: Japan builds up its ‘southern shield’ as faith in US security cover falters
stories.description: Japan is pushing the legal limit of ‘defence’ as it faces its ‘most severe and complex security environment’ since 1945.

stories.headline: Analysis: Iran war recalls US Navy's experience in 1980s 'Tanker war'
stories.description: US may repeat 1980s Navy protection of ships in Hormuz amid Iran tensions.

stories.headline: UK rights groups slam ‘authoritarian’ conviction of pro-Palestine activists
stories.description: Ruling against Ben Jamal and Chris Nineham will spawn a ‘broader chilling effect’, groups such as Amnesty and HRW warn.
